summary: 6 newsletters ingested. 2 critical (GPT-5.6 launch, Grok×Cursor), 2 high (Meta superintelligence, GPT-Live), 2 low (Mosseri authenticity, generic weekly roundup). Most topics already have wiki pages — downstream wiki-ingest should focus on enriching existing pages with new source links rather than creating new ones.

newsletters.subject: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Peripheral — Adam Mosseri (Instagram head) discussing AI's impact on content authenticity. Tangential to core LLM/agent wiki scope. Could be relevant if deepening a page on AI-generated content or social media AI policies, but not a priority.
newsletters.notes: Most links are substack redirect/play-card duplicates. Single podcast episode with no primary article URL extractable from the link structure.

newsletters.subject: Grok x Cursor
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Direct intersection of two tracked entities — Grok (xAI) and Cursor AI. Signals deepening xAI↔editor integration, which is a major trend in AI coding agents.
newsletters.notes: Ben's Bites article. Should enrich cursor-ai page with Grok integration details if not already captured. May also warrant updating grok entity pages.

newsletters.subject: 🎙️ GPT-Live Changes How We Talk to AI
newsletters.wiki_relevance: GPT-Live (full-duplex voice interaction) already has a wiki concept page. This article likely provides additional coverage or analysis of the feature's impact on human-AI interaction patterns.
newsletters.notes: Beehiiv tracking links — actual article URLs need resolution. All links are beehiiv redirect wrappers with no readable destination.

newsletters.subject: The Future of Meta Superintelligence: A 1 Year Progress Update
newsletters.wiki_relevance: SemiAnalysis deep-dive on Meta's superintelligence research progress over 1 year. Directly relevant to existing entities (Meta AI strategy, superintelligence concept pages). SemiAnalysis is a tracked entity. This is premium analysis content worth documenting.
newsletters.notes: SemiAnalysis is premium content — raw article scrape may be paywalled. Still worth recording as a source. May inform Meta AI entity or superintelligence concept pages. Links to @mlkan, @julienmartinprin, @jeremieeliahouontiveros suggest co-authors/acknowledged contributors.

newsletters.subject: True Positive Weekly #169
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Generic AI weekly roundup. Without resolving the redirect links, cannot determine specific topics. Likely aggregates news already covered by other sources in this batch.
newsletters.notes: AI Weekly roundup — may contain links to articles already ingested via other channels. Low priority for wiki creation but worth skimming if downstream pipeline has capacity.

newsletters.subject: [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Major OpenAI product launch: GPT-5.6 GA with Sol/Terra/Luna variants, Codex merged into ChatGPT superapp. OpenAI entity page already tracks this launch. swyx/Latent Space is a key AI news source. This article provides the AINews community roundup perspective on the launch.
newsletters.notes: swyx's AINews. OpenAI entity already notes 'GPT-5.6 GA (Sol/Terra/Luna), Codex merged into ChatGPT desktop'. This article adds the Latent Space / AINews community analysis angle. Should be added as a source to existing pages.
